AddConfigExtensionRequest_unstable.description: Persist a new extension to the user's global goose config.

AddSessionExtensionRequest_unstable.description: Add an extension to an active session.

AgentMention.description: A user-facing `@` mention target backed by an agent, recipe, or subrecipe source.

Annotations.description: Optional annotations for the client. The client can use annotations to inform how objects are used or displayed

The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional
metadata to their interactions. Implementations MUST NOT make assumptions about values at
these keys.

See protocol docs: [Extensibility](https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/extensibility)

AudioContent.description: Audio provided to or from an LLM.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the command does.

input.description: Input for the command if required

anyOf.description: All text that was typed after the command name is provided as input.

AvailableCommandInput.description: The input specification for a command.

_meta.description:
The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional
metadata to their interactions. Implementations MUST NOT make assumptions about values at

ContentBlock.description:
Content blocks represent displayable information in the Agent Client Protocol.

They provide a structured way to handle various types of user-facing content—whether
it's text from language models, images for analysis, or embedded resources for context.

Content blocks appear in:
- User prompts sent via `session/prompt`
- Language model output streamed through `session/update` notifications
- Progress updates and results from tool calls

This structure is compatible with the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling
agents to seamlessly forward content from MCP tool outputs without transformation.

See protocol docs: [Content](https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/content)

oneOf.description:
Text content. May be plain text or formatted with Markdown.

All agents MUST support text content blocks in prompts.
Clients SHOULD render this text as Markdown.

Images for visual context or analysis.

Requires the `image` prompt capability when included in prompts.

Audio data for transcription or analysis.

Requires the `audio` prompt capability when included in prompts.

References to resources that the agent can access.

All agents MUST support resource links in prompts.

Complete resource contents embedded directly in the message.

Preferred for including context as it avoids extra round-trips.

Requires the `embeddedContext` prompt capability when included in prompts.

CreateSourceRequest_unstable.description: Create a new source in an explicit target scope (global or project-scoped).

CustomProviderCreateRequest_unstable.description: Create a custom provider backed by Goose's declarative provider store.

CustomProviderDeleteRequest_unstable.description: Delete a custom provider from Goose's declarative provider store.

CustomProviderReadRequest_unstable.description: Read a declarative provider config. Custom configs are editable; bundled configs are read-only.

CustomProviderUpdateRequest_unstable.description: Update a custom provider backed by Goose's declarative provider store.

DefaultsReadRequest_unstable.description: Read Goose default provider and model configuration.

DefaultsSaveRequest_unstable.description: Save Goose default provider and model configuration.

DeleteSourceRequest_unstable.description: Delete a source and its on-disk directory by absolute path.

DictationConfigRequest_unstable.description: Get the configuration status of all dictation providers.

DictationConfigResponse_unstable.description: Dictation config response — map of provider name to status.

DictationModelDeleteRequest_unstable.description: Delete a downloaded local Whisper model from disk.

DictationModelDownloadProgressRequest_un.description: Poll the progress of an in-flight download.

progress.description: None when no download is active for this model id.

DictationModelDownloadRequest_unstable.description: Kick off a background download of a local Whisper model.

DictationModelSelectRequest_unstable.description: Persist the user's model selection for a given provider.

DictationModelsListRequest_unstable.description: List available local Whisper models with their download status.

DictationSecretDeleteRequest_unstable.description: Remove a dictation provider secret value.

DictationSecretSaveRequest_unstable.description: Set a dictation provider secret value.

DictationTranscribeRequest_unstable.description: Transcribe audio via a dictation provider.

EmbeddedResource.description: The contents of a resource, embedded into a prompt or tool call result.

The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional

EmbeddedResourceResource.description: Resource content that can be embedded in a message.

EmptyResponse.description: Empty success response for operations that return no data.

EnvVariable.description: An environment variable to set when launching an MCP server.

_meta.description:
The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional
metadata to their interactions. Implementations MUST NOT make assumptions about values at

name.description: The name of the environment variable.

value.description: The value to set for the environment variable.

ExportSessionRequest_unstable.description: Export a session as a JSON string.

ExportSessionResponse_unstable.description: Export session response — raw JSON of the goose session with `conversation`.

ExportSourceRequest_unstable.description: Export a source at an absolute path as a portable JSON payload.

GetAvailableExtensionsRequest_unstable.description: List Goose-owned extension definitions available to configure or enable.

GetConfigExtensionsRequest_unstable.description: List configured extensions and any warnings.

GetConfigExtensionsResponse_unstable.description: List configured extensions and any warnings.

GetSessionInfoRequest_unstable.description: Return list-style metadata for a single session without loading the conversation.

GetToolsRequest_unstable.description: List all tools available in a session.

tools.description: Array of tool info objects with `name`, `description`, `parameters`, and optional `permission`.

GooseSessionNotification_unstable.description:
Goose-custom session update notification — a parallel to ACP's
`session/update` carrying goose-specific update variants.

GooseSessionUpdate.description:
Discriminated union of goose-specific session update payloads.
Variant tag matches ACP's convention (`sessionUpdate: "<snake_case>"`).

`discriminator.mapping` is what makes TS codegen (`@hey-api/openapi-ts`)
emit the correct snake_case tag value even when this enum has a single
variant. Add a mapping entry per variant.

GooseToolCallRequest_unstable.description: Call a tool from an extension.

HttpHeader.description: An HTTP header to set when making requests to the MCP server.

The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional
metadata to their interactions. Implementations MUST NOT make assumptions about values at
these keys.

See protocol docs: [Extensibility](https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/extensibility)

name.description: The name of the HTTP header.

value.description: The value to set for the HTTP header.

ImageContent.description: An image provided to or from an LLM.

The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional

ImportSessionRequest_unstable.description: Import a session from a JSON string.

ImportSessionResponse_unstable.description: Import session response — metadata about the newly created session.

ImportSourcesRequest_unstable.description:
Import a source from a JSON export payload produced by `_goose/unstable/sources/export`.
The imported source is written into the explicit target scope; on name
collisions a `-imported` suffix is appended.

ListAgentMentionsRequest_unstable.description: List user-facing agent mention targets for `@` autocomplete.

ListProvidersRequest_unstable.description: List providers with setup metadata and the current model inventory snapshot.

providerIds.description: Only return entries for these providers. Empty means all.

ListSlashCommandsRequest_unstable.description: List slash commands available for `/` autocomplete.

ListSourcesRequest_unstable.description:
List discovered sources.

If `type` is omitted or `skill`, this lists filesystem/plugin skills only.
Both global and project-scoped skills are included when `project_dir` is
set. If `type` is `builtinSkill`, this lists shipped read-only built-in
skills.

includeProjectSources.description:
When true, also scan the working directories of all known projects for
project-scoped sources (e.g. skills stored under `{workingDir}/.agents/skills/`).

anyOf.description:
HTTP transport configuration

Only available when the Agent capabilities indicate `mcp_capabilities.http` is `true`.

SSE transport configuration

Only available when the Agent capabilities indicate `mcp_capabilities.sse` is `true`.

Stdio transport configuration

All Agents MUST support this transport.

McpServer.description:
Configuration for connecting to an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.

MCP servers provide tools and context that the agent can use when
processing prompts.

See protocol docs: [MCP Servers](https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/session-setup#mcp-servers)

The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional

headers.description: HTTP headers to set when making requests to the MCP server.

name.description: Human-readable name identifying this MCP server.

env.description: Environment variables to set when launching the MCP server.

OnboardingImportScanRequest_unstable.description: Scan for existing Goose and compatible app data that onboarding can import.

sources.description: Empty means all supported import sources.

OnboardingImportSourceKind.description: Sources that onboarding knows how to discover and import.

PreferencesReadRequest_unstable.description: Read allowlisted user preferences. Empty `keys` means all supported preferences.

ProviderCatalogListRequest_unstable.description: List custom-provider catalog entries. Omit `format` to list all formats.

ProviderCatalogTemplateRequest_unstable.description: Return the editable template for one catalog provider.

ProviderConfigAuthenticateRequest_unstab.description: Run a provider-owned native authentication flow and start an inventory refresh when supported.

ProviderConfigDeleteRequest_unstable.description: Delete provider configuration fields and start an inventory refresh when supported.

ProviderConfigReadRequest_unstable.description: Read saved configuration field values for one provider.

ProviderConfigSaveRequest_unstable.description: Save provider configuration fields and start an inventory refresh when supported.

ProviderConfigStatusRequest_unstable.description: Return provider configured statuses. Empty provider_ids means all providers.

category.description: Whether this inventory entry represents an agent provider or a model provider.

configKeys.description: Required configuration keys and setup metadata.

configured.description: Whether Goose has enough configuration to use this provider.

defaultModel.description: The default/recommended model for this provider.

lastRefreshAttemptAt.description: When a refresh was most recently attempted (ISO 8601).

lastRefreshError.description: The last refresh failure message, if any.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When this entry was last successfully refreshed (ISO 8601).

modelSelectionHint.description: Guidance message shown when this provider manages its own model selection externally.

refreshing.description: Whether a refresh is currently in flight.

stale.description: Whether we believe this data may be outdated.

supportsRefresh.description: Whether this provider supports background inventory refresh.

ProviderInventoryModelDto.description: A single model in provider inventory.

family.description: Model family for grouping in UI.

id.description: Model identifier as the provider knows it.

reasoning.description: Whether the model supports reasoning/extended thinking.

recommended.description: Whether this model should appear in the compact recommended picker.

ProviderSupportedModelsListRequest_unsta.description: List the raw model identifiers returned by a provider's live supported-models API.

ReadResourceRequest_unstable.description: Read a resource from an extension.

result.description: The resource result from the extension (MCP ReadResourceResult).

RefreshProviderInventoryRequest_unstable.description: Trigger a background refresh of provider inventories.

providerIds.description: Which providers to refresh. Empty means all known providers.

skipped.description: Which providers were skipped and why.

RemoveConfigExtensionRequest_unstable.description: Remove a persisted extension from the user's global goose config.

RemoveSessionExtensionRequest_unstable.description: Remove an extension from an active session.

ResourceLink.description: A resource that the server is capable of reading, included in a prompt or tool call result.

_meta.description:
The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional
metadata to their interactions. Implementations MUST NOT make assumptions about values at
these keys.

See protocol docs: [Extensibility](https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/extensibility)

Role.description: The sender or recipient of messages and data in a conversation.

SessionId.description:
A unique identifier for a conversation session between a client and agent.

Sessions maintain their own context, conversation history, and state,
allowing multiple independent interactions with the same agent.

See protocol docs: [Session ID](https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/session-setup#session-id)

SessionInfo.description: Information about a session returned by session/list

_meta.description:
The _meta property is reserved by ACP to allow clients and agents to attach additional
metadata to their interactions. Implementations MUST NOT make assumptions about values at
these keys.

See protocol docs: [Extensibility](https://agentclientprotocol.com/protocol/extensibility)

additionalDirectories.description:
**UNSTABLE**

This capability is not part of the spec yet, and may be removed or changed at any point.

Authoritative ordered additional workspace roots for this session. Each path must be absolute.

When omitted or empty, there are no additional roots for the session.

cwd.description: The working directory for this session. Must be an absolute path.

SessionSystemPromptMode.description: How a session system prompt update should be applied.

oneOf.description: Replace Goose's base system prompt with the provided text.
Append the provided text under Goose's "Additional Instructions" section.

SessionUsageUpdate.description: Streaming context-window usage update for a session.

SetConfigExtensionEnabledRequest_unstabl.description: Set the `enabled` flag for a persisted extension in the user's global goose config.

SetSessionSystemPromptRequest_unstable.description:
Set, append, or clear system prompt text for a session.

`mode: "set"` replaces Goose's base system prompt. `mode: "append"` adds an
instruction under "Additional Instructions". Reusing a key replaces the
previous value for that mode/key; sending empty text clears it.

global.description:
True when the source lives in the user's global sources directory; false
when it lives inside a specific project.

path.description:
Stable on-disk path identifying this source. Pass it back to
update/delete/export to operate on this entry. Skills use the directory
containing `SKILL.md`; projects use the project file path; built-in
skills use `builtin://skills/<name>` synthetic paths.

properties.description:
Arbitrary key/value pairs for type-specific metadata (e.g. icon, color,
preferredProvider for projects). Stored in the frontmatter.

supportingFiles.description:
Paths (absolute) of additional files that live alongside the source.
Only skills currently populate this; empty for other source types.

writable.description:
True when this source can be modified through source CRUD methods.
Client-provided bundled sources are returned as read-only.

SourceScope.description: Target scope for creating or importing sources.

StatusMessageUpdate.description:
Live UI/session status. This is not conversation transcript content, and
should not be persisted or replayed as history.

SteerSessionRequest_unstable.description: Add user input to the currently active prompt without starting a new prompt.

messageId.description:
Stable id of the queued steer message. The same id later appears as
`messageId` on the streamed `UserMessageChunk` (with `_meta.goose.steer`),
letting clients correlate a queued steer with its pickup.

TextContent.description: Text provided to or from an LLM.

TruncateSessionConversationRequest_unsta.description: Truncate a session conversation from the given message timestamp onward.

UnstructuredCommandInput.description: All text that was typed after the command name is provided as input.

metadata to their interactions. Implementations MUST NOT make assumptions about values at

hint.description: A hint to display when the input hasn't been provided yet

UpdateSessionProjectRequest_unstable.description: Update the project association for a session.

UpdateSourceRequest_unstable.description: Update an existing source's name, description, and content by absolute path.

properties.description:
When `Some`, replaces all stored properties on the source. When
`None` (or omitted), the source's existing properties are
preserved. Callers that don't model the full property bag (e.g.
the skills editor, which only edits name/description/content)
should omit this so per-skill metadata isn't silently erased.

UpdateWorkingDirRequest_unstable.description: Update the working directory for a session.
